_comment: Canonical TikTok API product catalog. Source: developers.tiktok.com/doc/changelog (40 dated entries Feb 2023 to June 2026). Used by integrations-engine and shortform-repurposing. Updated when tiktok-api-changelog source fires a change event. Do not invent endpoints — null and flag instead.

api_products.aigc_note: post_info.is_aigc boolean is REQUIRED disclosure for AI-generated or AI-assisted content. Must be set to true when Claude generates scripts used in the video.
api_products.freshness_note: Current as of June 2026. Verify against tiktok-api-changelog on 14-day cycle.

api_products.access_tier: non-profit and academic institutions only — approval required

recent_changelog.change: favorites_count added to video query response
display_name added to comment query response
All public videos now included, including FYP-ineligible content

api_products.freshness_note: Current as of June 2026. Changes are documented in tiktok-api-changelog.

api_products.access_note: Read-only. Does not include engagement metrics. For metrics, use Research API (requires institutional access).
Limited to EU region paid advertising transparency. Not relevant for organic creator content in the US market.

api_products.access_tier: EEA and UK users only — security review required
api_products.access_note: Geo-restricted. Not applicable for US-based creators without EEA/UK accounts.

Available to brands and marketing agencies for influencer discovery. Not directly accessible to individual creators. Brands the creator partners with may use this to provide demographic data for media kit purposes.

algorithm_signals_summary._source: tiktok-newsroom official algorithm transparency + confirmed third-party analyses
explicit_non_factors: prior_video_performance (one bad video does not suppress future)

key_creator_guidance.rewatch_design: Design content with a re-watch hook — a reveal, a detail, or a transformation that rewards a second view. This is the highest-leverage single change for TikTok distribution.
key_creator_guidance.caption_as_seo: Treat captions as keyword fields. 84% of TikTok searches are exploration-phase. Keywords in captions influence both FYP placement and search visibility.
key_creator_guidance.aigc_disclosure: Set is_aigc: true on any video where AI-generated script or AI-generated visuals are used. FTC disclosure requirements also apply — verbal and text disclosure in the video.
key_creator_guidance.watermark_warning: Never repost a TikTok-watermarked video to Instagram or YouTube Shorts. Meta and YouTube detect watermarks and suppress distribution. Use the original file.
